title: AWS Marketplace: AI Strategy Sprint + Pilot Plan - Amazon.com
search_path_label: 采购 / 招投标 / Marketplace 路径
full_text:
AI Strategy Sprint + Pilot Plan
Info
Sold by: DevIQ
A 3–4 week engagement that aligns AI vision with business goals, prioritizes 3–5 high‑impact use cases, and produces a board‑ready roadmap with a 90‑day pilot activation charter—accelerating measurable ROI on AWS‑powered AI initiatives.
Request private offer
Overview
Pricing
Legal
Resources
Support
Overview
Try agent mode
Create proposal
Ask question
The DevIQ AI Strategy Sprint + Pilot Plan is a focused, executive level engagement designed to jumpstart your AI transformation. Over three to four weeks, our cross functional team guides stakeholders through:
Vision & Value Alignment – framing AI ambitions against growth, efficiency, and user-experience objectives.
Use Case Discovery & ROI Modeling – surfacing, sizing, and ranking 3–5 high value AI opportunities with payback and KPI projections.
Readiness Assessment – evaluating data, platform, and organizational maturity to deliver AI at scale on AWS (e.g., Bedrock, SageMaker, Lake Formation, DynamoDB, OpenSearch, etc.).
Target State Architecture & Governance Blueprint – reference patterns for agentic workloads (Bedrock Agents + RAG), data pipelines, MLOps, security, and responsible AI guardrails.
Roadmap & Pilot Charter – a 12-18 month execution roadmap with milestones and success metrics, plus a detailed 90-day pilot activation plan.
This structured sprint de-risks investment decisions, provides a board-ready strategy pack, and equips your teams to deliver quick prototypes while paving the way for enterprise grade AI.
Highlights
Board‑ready strategy, roadmap, and 90‑day pilot plan – delivered in 3–4 weeks.
Prioritizes 3–5 high‑ROI (25‑50%) AI use cases with transparent financial modeling. Includes data, platform, talent, and governance readiness checks to de‑risk production scaling on AWS.
Ideal for organizations at the beginning of their AI journey or seeking to align leadership, prioritize use cases, and accelerate time-to-impact.

Contact us: email: info@DevIQ.io OR phone: +1.303.232.3840 [< www.DevIQ.io >]
